figures.caption: Table 4. Knapsack Performance. Comparison by correlation type. Objective values are mean± standard deviation over five seeds; time values are seed averages. (↑) indicates higher is better.
Table 6. Distribution of Heuristics in the Augmented Dataset

Fig. 1. Latent Space Visualization. A 2D t-SNE projection of program embeddings for the TSP. The color gradient represents the heuristic score, showing that high-performing programs (lighter colors) cluster together rather than being randomly dispersed.
Table 1. TSP Performance. Comparison on TSP-50, TSP-100, and TSP-200. Objective values are mean ± standard deviation over seeds; time values are seed averages. (↓) indicates lower is better.
